# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Repository Overview

This is a minimal Python 3 repository containing a "Hello World" script.

- **Primary language:** Python 3
- **Frameworks/libraries:** None (standard library only)
- **Package manager:** None
- **CI/CD:** None configured

## Local Commands

| Task        | Command                        | Notes                          |
|-------------|--------------------------------|--------------------------------|
| Run script  | `python3 hello.py`             | Runs the Hello World script    |
| Install     | N/A                            | No external dependencies       |
| Test        | N/A                            | No test framework configured   |
| Lint        | N/A                            | No linter configured           |
| Format      | N/A                            | No formatter configured        |
| Typecheck   | N/A                            | No type checker configured     |

## Conventions

- Python scripts use the `#!/usr/bin/env python3` shebang line.
- Entry points are guarded with `if __name__ == "__main__":`.
- No external dependencies; keep the standard library only unless a package is explicitly added.
